briefdescription.para: No-connect sentinel. Pass where no physical pin exists.

detaileddescription.para: All reads return false / 0; all writes are no-ops. Provided as a named constant for readability in wiring maps.
Usage: PinRef pins[] = { PinRef(exp1, PORT_A, 0), PIN_NC, PinRef(exp1, PORT_A, 2) };
See also: ANALOG_NC (0xFFFF) for AnalogMultiPos unused voltage levels.
